articles.title_en: Over 30 Russians, including two children, killed in Ukrainian strikes over week — envoy
articles.lead_en: Rodion Miroshnik specified that more than 90% of the total number of victims – 185 people – were injured in attacks by Ukrainian attack drones

articles.title_en: Attacks on Belgorod Region Leave At Least 1 Dead, Multiple Wounded
articles.lead_en: Meanwhile, Russian attacks against Ukraine on Monday killed at least seven people and injured dozens of others.
